title: scutellaria incisa
intro: Scutellaria incisa, also known as the cutleaf skullcap, is a plant species native to East Asia and belongs to the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria incisa include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. Scutellaria incisa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
